name: Fat-Free Carrot Cake
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces canned pineapple tidbits in natural juice, drained
4 ounces light cream cheese or Neufchatel, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Thoroughly coat a 9x13 inch baking pan with non-stick cooking spray and set aside.
3. In a bowl, combine flour, wheat germ, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt. Stir until blended and set aside.
4. In a large mixing bowl, combine brown sugar, egg substitute, yogurt, and vanilla extract. Beat on medium speed until the sugar dissolves.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture to the wet ingredients, beating only until all the flour is moistened.
6. Scrape down the sides of the bowl with a spatula.
7. Fold in pineapple, raisins, and shredded carrots.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan and smooth the surface.
9. Bake in the preheated oven for 30-40 minutes or until set.
10. Allow to cool completely.
11. To make frosting, beat cream cheese until soft. Gradually add powdered sugar, vanilla extract, almond extract, and lemon juice, beating until fluffy and smooth. Spread frosting over top of cooled cake.
